title: 菊花賞の後に・見よ！キタサン祭り

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
They're coming into the final corner! Just listen to
the crowd roar!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
(I can hear them... I hear them loud and clear!
They want this race to ramp up even more!)

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
(I get it now. Races are just like festivals! And if
that's the case...)

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
(I'll have to take the lead and be the Umamusume
setting the tempo for everyone! This is my
festival! All right...)

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I'll use these legs of mine! To crank this festival up
to eleven! RAAAAAGH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, check out Kitasan Black! She was a
complete no-name when she first started out, but
look at her now.

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
That's some dang good running! If she's gotten
this far, then she's the real deal!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black does fantastic at the Kikuka Sho.
Her spirited performance seems to have
convinced even the most stubborn of fans to
notice her.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Nature! Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I couldn't have done it without the two of you!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
So, what did you think? Were you able to run in a
way that didn't give people the chance to notice
that the star of the race was missing?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Um, well... I'm not sure what people noticed or
thought, but...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I was able to run it the way I wanted to! It felt like I was throwing my very own festival today! A Kitasan festival!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: A Kitasan festival!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Then I suppose it would be a "Nice Nature
festival" in my case...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Oh, no, no, no. I don't think I can do that.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I take back what I said. Kitasan really is a star
racer after all.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Her ability to recover after a setback is far too
incredible. Goodness, there's no way I can
compare to her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nice Nature shrugs helplessly, but her smile
doesn't fade a bit.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! You can thank that on the Bakushin spirit I
bestowed upon her!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Bakushin O!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
You have done well, young Bakushin grasshopper.
I have nothing left to teach you!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
This class rep here has crossed paths with you
indeed, but now she must be off. Other poor souls
need a helping hand.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: You're going already, Bakushin O?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I am. You are not the only one driven to help
others.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Bakushin O... You've taught me something of the
utmost importance!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
To Bakushin is to do! No matter what and no
matter when, you must keep going!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
It may seem simple, but never giving up and
forever moving onward is critical beyond words!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I'll never forget that, ever.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Good! Keep moving forward! In the Victory Club I
was taught at, I wrote that the kanji for "progress"
should be read as "Bakushin"!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
My teacher docked off points when I did that on
my spelling test, but hey! Anyways, see ya!
Bakushin to your own tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And then, Sakura Bakushin O disappears the
same way she arrived—with a sonic boom.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Our own tomorrow... She's right. Tomorrow
doesn't come just for me. Next is—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black has proven herself, but there is
another brand-new story that's getting underway
in the pouring rain.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: GOOOOO! DIAAAAA!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond has come first in her debut race!
That's right, this 500 million carat racer has
seized victory! She's a real diamond in the rough!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Dia... Way to go! You've got to keep it up!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I bet you'll manage to win a G1 race no problem
if you do, which means you'll be able to make
your wish come true, and then... and then!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Yes, I'm sure too, Kita. I may have started later than you, but I will catch up.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
So go on ahead and watch me carefully! Next
year, once the Classic Triple Crown is over...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Let's race together on the stage where the best of
the classic and senior athletes gather, the Arima
Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: The Arima Kinen! What do you think, Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Arima Kinen is officially our goal. We'll have
one year to prepare for the dream ahead of us.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I'll hit the ground running! The Kikuka Sho was my
little Kitasan festival, but the Arima is a bona fide
year-end festival!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I bet Dad's gonna love it! I've gotta make sure to
ramp it up to twenty!
